evals.name: version-decision-support
evals.prompt: What should the next rstest version be? Show me what changed since the last release and give me the version options. Don't start the release yet.
evals.expected_output: Runs release-tools.mjs preflight/bump-menu (read-only), shows bumpp's native commit list and version menu verbatim, explains repo convention (0.x patch releases routinely contain feats; conventional line is input not decision), presents options without choosing autonomously.

evals.name: resume-state-detection
evals.prompt: I think a release of rstest was in progress recently — can you figure out where it stands and what's left to do?
evals.expected_output: Walks the resume checklist in order: checks for release/* PRs, recent release.yml runs, npm live status, tag/release existence. Correctly concludes whether a release is in progress (and at which step) or the latest release is fully complete. Read-only throughout.

evals.name: approval-guidance
evals.prompt: The release CI for rstest just finished staging the packages. How do I approve them so they go live? Walk me through it.
evals.expected_output: Explains the 2FA approval is human-only, offers BOTH the one-OTP release-tools.mjs approve-staged command path and the npmjs.com Staged Packages web link (on its own line), explains stage-id extraction from the run log, and points to release-tools.mjs verify-live as the gate before merging.
